metadata.description: Batch 41 — additional Oxford 5000 words 1001-1100; source-aligned from attached PDF

words.definitionEn: a period of time or space between events
words.example: Set the inspection interval to one minute.

words.definitionEn: to become involved to change an outcome
words.definitionTh: เข้าแทรกแซง
words.example: The operator must intervene when the alarm appears.

words.definitionEn: action taken to improve or stop a situation
words.definitionTh: การแทรกแซง
words.example: Manual intervention is required only during faults.

words.definitionEn: private and closely personal
words.definitionTh: ใกล้ชิด / เป็นส่วนตัว
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “intimate”.

words.definitionEn: very interesting because it is unusual
words.definitionTh: น่าสนใจชวนติดตาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “intriguing”.

words.definitionEn: to enter a country by force
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “invade”.

words.definitionEn: the act of entering a country by force
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “invasion”.

words.definitionEn: a complete list of goods or equipment
words.definitionTh: สินค้าคงคลัง
words.example: Update the spare-parts inventory.

words.definitionEn: a person who examines facts to discover truth
words.example: The investigator reviewed the incident data.

words.definitionEn: a person who puts money into a business
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “investor”.

words.definitionEn: unable to be seen
words.definitionTh: มองไม่เห็น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “invisible”.

words.definitionEn: to call on a rule, authority, or process
words.definitionTh: อ้าง / เรียกใช้
words.example: The PLC invokes the reject sequence.

words.definitionEn: the act of taking part in something
words.definitionTh: การมีส่วนร่วม
words.example: Operator involvement improved the design.

words.definitionEn: showing an unexpected contrast in a humorous way
words.definitionTh: ประชดประชัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ironic”.

words.definitionEn: in a way that shows unexpected contrast
words.definitionTh: อย่างประชดประชัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “ironically”.

words.definitionEn: a situation where the result is opposite to expectation
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “irony”.

words.definitionEn: not connected with the subject
words.definitionTh: ไม่เกี่ยวข้อง
words.example: Remove irrelevant records from the dataset.

words.definitionEn: to separate from other things
words.example: Isolate the power before maintenance.

words.definitionEn: separate and far from others
words.example: The fault was isolated to one sensor.

words.definitionEn: the state of being separated from others
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “isolation”.

words.definitionEn: a place for prisoners; to put someone there
words.definitionTh: คุก / จำคุก
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “jail”.

words.definitionEn: an aircraft powered by jet engines
words.definitionTh: เครื่องบินไอพ่น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “jet”.

words.definitionEn: shared by two parties; a place where parts connect
words.definitionTh: ร่วม / ข้อต่อ
words.example: Inspect the cable joint for damage.

words.definitionEn: the work of collecting and reporting news
words.definitionTh: วารสารศาสตร์
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “journalism”.

words.definitionEn: relating to courts and judges
words.definitionTh: ทางตุลาการ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “judicial”.

words.definitionEn: the legal authority of a court or organization
words.definitionTh: เขตอำนาจศาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “jurisdiction”.

words.definitionEn: a group that decides facts in a court case
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “jury”.

words.definitionEn: fair and morally right
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “just”.

words.definitionEn: a reason showing that something is right or necessary
words.definitionTh: เหตุผลสนับสนุน

words.definitionEn: very interested or eager
words.definitionTh: กระตือรือร้น
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “keen”.

words.definitionEn: to take someone away illegally
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “kidnap”.

words.definitionEn: an organ that filters waste from blood
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “kidney”.

words.definitionEn: a school for very young children
words.definitionTh: โรงเรียนอนุบาล
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “kindergarten”.

words.definitionEn: a country ruled by a king or queen
words.definitionTh: ราชอาณาจักร
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “kingdom”.

words.definitionEn: a set of tools or equipment for a task
words.definitionTh: ชุดอุปกรณ์
words.example: Keep the calibration kit near the station.

words.definitionEn: equipment with steps for climbing
words.example: Use the ladder according to safety rules.

words.definitionEn: the act of coming down to the ground
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “landing”.

words.definitionEn: a person who rents property to others
words.definitionTh: เจ้าของบ้านเช่า

words.definitionEn: an important recognizable place or achievement

words.definitionEn: a marked strip for vehicles or movement
words.definitionTh: ช่องทาง / เลน

words.definitionEn: the top of the legs when sitting or one circuit
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lap”.

words.definitionEn: involving many people or a wide area
words.example: The solution supports large-scale deployment.

words.definitionEn: a device producing a narrow powerful beam of light
words.example: Align the laser with the target.

words.definitionEn: recently
words.definitionTh: เมื่อไม่นานมานี้
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lately”.

words.definitionEn: the second of two things mentioned
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “latter”.

words.definitionEn: a person who makes laws
words.definitionTh: ผู้ร่างกฎหมาย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lawmaker”.

words.definitionEn: an area of short grass near a building
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lawn”.

words.definitionEn: a legal claim brought to court
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lawsuit”.

words.definitionEn: the arrangement of parts in an area or document
words.definitionTh: ผัง / รูปแบบการจัดวาง

words.definitionEn: to let liquid or information escape accidentally
words.definitionTh: รั่ว / การรั่ว
words.example: The test detected an air leak.

words.definitionEn: to jump a long distance or increase suddenly
words.example: AI created a major leap in accuracy.

words.definitionEn: something important received from the past
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “legacy”.

words.definitionEn: a traditional story or very famous person
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “legend”.

words.definitionEn: famous and admired over a long period
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “legendary”.

words.definitionEn: laws made by a governing body
words.example: The project must comply with legislation.

words.definitionEn: relating to the making of laws
words.definitionTh: ทางนิติบัญญัติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “legislative”.

words.definitionEn: a body with authority to make laws
words.definitionTh: สภานิติบัญญัติ
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “legislature”.

words.definitionEn: lawful, reasonable, or genuine
words.example: Use only legitimate software licenses.

words.definitionEn: taking a long time
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lengthy”.

words.definitionEn: a curved piece of glass that focuses light
words.example: Clean the camera lens before production.

words.definitionEn: relating to a woman attracted to women
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lesbian”.

words.definitionEn: smaller or less important
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lesser”.

words.definitionEn: able to cause death
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lethal”.

words.definitionEn: legally responsible or likely to experience something
words.definitionTh: ต้องรับผิด / มีแนวโน้ม
words.example: The part is liable to fail under vibration.

words.definitionEn: supporting individual freedom and social change
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “liberal”.

words.definitionEn: the act of becoming free
words.definitionTh: การปลดปล่อย
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “liberation”.

words.definitionEn: freedom from control
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “liberty”.

words.definitionEn: continuing throughout a person’s life
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lifelong”.

words.definitionEn: the total period of a person or product’s existence
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lifetime”.

words.definitionEn: the arrangement and use of light
words.example: Stable lighting improves image quality.

words.definitionEn: the probability that something will happen
words.definitionTh: ความเป็นไปได้
words.example: Score the likelihood of failure.

words.definitionEn: in the same way
words.definitionTh: เช่นเดียวกัน
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “likewise”.

words.definitionEn: an arm or leg
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “limb”.

words.definitionEn: a condition that restricts ability or performance
words.example: Document each technical limitation.

words.definitionEn: forming or following a straight line
words.definitionTh: เป็นเส้นตรง
words.example: The chart shows a linear relationship.

words.definitionEn: a list of people or items selected for an event
words.definitionTh: รายชื่อผู้เข้าร่วม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lineup”.

words.definitionEn: to remain longer than expected
words.definitionTh: คงอยู่ / อ้อยอิ่ง
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “linger”.

words.definitionEn: an entry in an organized list
words.example: Check the product listing.

words.definitionEn: a metric unit of liquid volume
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “liter”.

words.definitionEn: the ability to read and write
words.definitionTh: การรู้หนังสือ

words.definitionEn: exactly as stated or truly
words.definitionTh: ตามตัวอักษร / อย่างแท้จริง

words.definitionEn: relating to literature
words.definitionTh: ทางวรรณกรรม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “literary”.

words.definitionEn: waste left in public places
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “litter”.

words.definitionEn: an organ that processes chemicals in the body
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “liver”.

words.definitionEn: a group seeking influence; to seek influence
words.definitionTh: ล็อบบี้ / โน้มน้าว

words.definitionEn: a record of events; to record information
words.definitionTh: บันทึก / ท่อนซุง

words.definitionEn: a system of correct reasoning
words.example: Review the reject logic in the PLC.

words.definitionEn: a symbol identifying an organization or product
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “logo”.

words.definitionEn: existing for many years
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “long-standing”.

words.definitionEn: having existed or served for a long time
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “longtime”.

words.definitionEn: to appear as a large or threatening shape
words.definitionTh: ปรากฏคุกคาม
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “loom”.

words.definitionEn: a path returning to its starting point
words.example: The controller runs in a continuous loop.

words.definitionEn: a game in which numbers are drawn for prizes
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lottery”.

words.definitionEn: remaining faithful to a person or organization
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “loyal”.

words.definitionEn: the quality of remaining faithful
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “loyalty”.

words.definitionEn: the words of a song
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “lyric”.

words.definitionEn: machines considered collectively
words.definitionTh: เครื่องจักร
words.example: Install guards around moving machinery.

words.definitionEn: having a special or wonderful quality
words.definitionTh: มีมนตร์ขลัง

words.definitionEn: able to attract iron or affected by magnets
words.definitionTh: เป็นแม่เหล็ก

words.definitionEn: extremely beautiful or impressive
words.example: The report provides a clear example of “magnificent”.
